name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Factory Gold Thread Embroidery with Imported Cowhide Shopping Bag
name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Factory Gold Thread Embroidery with Imported Cowhide Shopping Bag
Tote Latest Autumn Winter Christmas Series, I was recommended this bag, the tote that can be carried is here. It retains the simplicity of the bag shape while also having the large capacity of a large bag. It can be carried by hand or crossbody, fully meeting daily travel needs. Classic animal embroidery, iconic letters, fashionable and versatile with a full vintage vibe.
size:36*16*27cm
